title: Together, In To An Uncharted Future

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
I'm fine now. 
……I'm sorry, for troubling you like this when we're overseas.

Almond Eye had nearly collapsed so we had her lay 
down for a bit with some ice. It was nighttime 
by the time she seemed to have fully recovered.

Her body had been so overheated that it was noticeable 
to the touch. Even though it was immediately after 
a race, she hadn't been sweating much at all.
choice_data_list: Seems like you get overheated easily
Seems like you get overheated easily

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
……Yes. Especially after races, 
I sometimes get so hot that I end up collapsing.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Yes…… I'm not very resilient. Even during this 
expedition, before I realized it, I had lost some weight.

She pushed herself through that intense training and even 
managed to win her revenge match overseas……but she's frail?

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I try to take a shower as soon as I can after a race, 
and I do try to do what I can to prevent it from happening.

I thought she was physically and mentally strong. 
——No, there's no doubt her physical condition is amazing.

But, what was more astounding was her mental strength. 
That was the reason she was able to train herself to this level.

It wasn't ordinary by any stretch of the imagination. 
It was incredibly rare, an extraordinary strength of mind.

Someone like her could win the Triple Tiara, win an overseas G1, and 
even break a World Record…… No, maybe even something more amazing——
choice_data_list: (To a partner like that, I will……)
(To a partner like that, I will……)

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
——That's why I want to get stronger. In mind, and body. 
To be able to accomplish whatever I set out to do.

Our levels are just too different. Almond Eye's 
brilliance was such that I couldn't help but think that.

text_block_list.name: Rookie Trainer
text_block_list.text:
OhhーThat girl that placed first is good. Maybe she's planning 
to be a Sprinter? I'll try talking to her afterwards.

After returning home, life returns to normal. To find a partner Uma 
Musume, watching mock races and observing training with instructors——

All the Uma Musume who enter Tracen Academy are talented. 
There were many who could go on to achieve great things. But……

For a change of pace, I decided to take a walk 
along a backroad along the coast. The sound of the 
waves and faint smell of the ocean were soothing.
……Oh.

A butterfly fluttered weakly by. Feeling a sense of déjà vu, 
I followed after it……and ended up on a wide, sandy beach.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: Haaaaaaa!!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Haa, haa, haa! 
……——Fufuu! Fufufuu! Taaaaaa!!

Her feet effortlessly moved through the sand, her tail swishing 
about. She ran straight ahead, chasing after the sparkling horizon.

The days we spent together flashed through my mind. 
Her bright eyes as she ran. The profile of someone 
who pushed themself to the limit, never letting up.

A bold declaration as she cleared her goal. 
An obsession with victory that could be intimidating——

The myriad futures that could be hers. Each of them shining 
brightly. ——My heart felt heavy as I could feel tears welling up.

There was nothing she couldn't accomplish. 
Almond Eye's sparkle was so bright it could make you believe that!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Haa, haa……phew-…… ——Ah, what a coincidence! 
To think I'd be able to meet you here……it's perfect timing!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: I really wanted to see you again!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: Yes! Just now, I was trying this out.

She pulled out her tablet and showed it to me. It was 
the 『ver.1』 draft that I had sent her by mistake before.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
The first time I saw it, I didn't realize it was unfinished. To be 
honest, I thought the difference between it and 『ver.9』 were minor.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
But, after trying them out personally, it was completely different! 
Compared to 『ver.9』 it didn't feel as natural as I expected.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
……This is the result of your thorough revisions, 
isn't it? That day, you didn't get much sleep 
did you? I remember just how pale your face was.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
……I don't want to lose to anyone but, for you, above all else, 
you don't want to lose to yourself do you? That's why——

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: Will you become my trainer?

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Someone that is unwilling to compromise is someone 
that I can trust. If you're with me, then without a 
doubt, I will become even stronger. ……How about it?

I was caught off guard by the sudden turn of events. 
Truthfully, her strength made me hesitate to scout her. 
I wanted to tell her, but I just couldn't put it in to words——
The Triple Tiara, Overseas G1 victory, World Records, or even——!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
However——When an Uma Musume that can achieve 
that appears, I'm sure all eyes will be on her.

Something unprecedented, beyond imagination……
Before I realized it, I was already asking her.
choice_data_list: How would you get 8 G1 victories?
How would you get 8 G1 victories?

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
G1, 8 of them? Ummm…… Let's see. 
That's something nobody has ever accomplished before, right?

Right, something that nobody has ever done before. 
Therefore, if you had the answer——

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
……I don't know how. I don't know the answer. 
But, on the other hand, why do you think it's not possible?

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
You just have to fight with your full strength and win. Just do 
that 8 times. There's not much difference between 7 and 8 victories.

It was the answer of someone who spent their days 
breaking common sense——Light, certain, confident.
choice_data_list: (Maybe this is the kind of Uma Musume——)

text_block_list.text:
————A butterfly. 
It fluttered between the two of us.

It spread its wings and flew out to the sea. 
Flapping its wings as if regaining strength, little by little——

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
……That reminds me. 
Butterflies that cross the ocean, I've heard stories about them.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
A butterfly's wings are soft, and tiny. But…… 
How do you know if they wouldn't be able to cross the ocean?

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
I believe they can. No matter what storms they face—— 
If they have a goal, then they can make it.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: ……Right? Don't you think so?
